Name: IMF.P.Security.CreateGroups
Purpose: Provision or validate the required IMF security groups.

Parameters.Name: pUseBedrock
Parameters.Description: Delegate generic group plumbing to Bedrock when Y.

Parameters.Name: pBedrockProcess
Parameters.Description: Bedrock or wrapper process used for group-create mechanics.

Parameters.Name: pStrictBedrock
Parameters.Description: Stop if Bedrock group delegation is requested but unavailable.

Parameters.Name: pBedrockMode
Parameters.Description: Describe how Bedrock should participate in the environment.
